title: Amazon–Future Group dispute settled; Delhi High Court closes challenge to arbitral award
description: The Delhi High Court on April 28 disposed of petitions filed by Future Group entities challenging an arbitral award in their dispute with Amazon LLC, after noting that the parties had reached a settlement.Justice Harish Vaidyanathan Shankar recorded, "Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the parties are ad idem that the disputes between the parties stand resolved and the settlement has been formally reduced into a Settlement Agreement dated 13.03.2026."Justice Harish Vaidyanathan ShankarThe or
